items.title: Josh Minott, Nets Agree To Two-Year, $9M Deal https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/286363/Josh-Minott-Nets-Agree-To-Two-Year-$9M-Deal
items.author: RealGM
items.body_excerpt: Josh Minott, Nets Agree To Two-Year, $9M Deal https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/286363/Josh-Minott-Nets-Agree-To-Two-Year-$9M-Deal

items.title: Sources: The Brooklyn Nets plan to sign Josh Minott to a two-year, $9 million deal. Team option Year 2. He averaged 10.8 points on 49% shooting from the field and 40% from 3-point range in 19.3 minutes for Brooklyn last season. Agent Aaron Turner and Nets officials did the deal.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Brooklyn Nets plan to sign Josh Minott to a two-year, $9 million deal. Team option Year 2. He averaged 10.8 points on 49% shooting from the field and 40% from 3-point range in 19.3 minutes for Brooklyn last season. Agent Aaron Turner and Nets officials did the deal.

items.title: Nets To Sign Day’Ron Sharpe, Josh Minott To Two-Year Deals
items.author: Hoops Rumors
items.body_excerpt: Nets To Sign Day’Ron Sharpe, Josh Minott To Two-Year Deals Hoops Rumors

items.title: Brooklyn Nets center Day'Ron Sharpe intends to sign a new two-year, $20 million deal to return to the franchise, sources tell ESPN. Nets declined Sharpe's team option to do a new contract, just as they did with Josh Minott.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Brooklyn Nets center Day'Ron Sharpe intends to sign a new two-year, $20 million deal to return to the franchise, sources tell ESPN. Nets declined Sharpe's team option to do a new contract, just as they did with Josh Minott.

items.title: Brooklyn Nets forward Josh Minott intends to sign a new two-year, $9 million to return to the franchise, with a team option in second season, sources tell ESPN. The Nets declined Minott’s team option to clear the way for a new contract.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Brooklyn Nets forward Josh Minott intends to sign a new two-year, $9 million to return to the franchise, with a team option in second season, sources tell ESPN. The Nets declined Minott’s team option to clear the way for a new contract.
